lesson: When a contract pins exact stdout bytes, assert one string equality against the same serialization expression the spec names — covers order, values, formatting, trailing newline in one unfakeable assertion.
Stripped-PATH shell tests must invoke the interpreter by absolute path (/bin/bash): BSD env resolves the interpreter against the already-stripped PATH and 127s before the script runs.
When a pinned literal collides with markdown table syntax (merge|pr), pin the escaped form (merge\|pr) with a grep -cF assertion — a raw pipe silently truncates the cell on GitHub.
When a contract pins empty stderr, verify by redirecting streams to files — zsh MULTIOS silently tees stdout into 2>&1 1>/dev/null pipelines and fakes phantom stderr bytes.

Sync chunked openSync/readSync + StringDecoder + carry string lets a frozen synchronous CLI gain streaming IO inside one helper body; test chunk boundaries with fixtures sized from the source-extracted chunk constant, and keep true giant-file repros env-gated.

When a prompt-asset consumes data nothing produces yet, wire producer and consumer in one contract with one shared pinned shape; producer no-data behavior = append nothing, so the honest fallback is the first runs real path.

Evaluators that flip contract status must COMMIT the flip in the worktree; uncommitted evaluator edits block worktree removal at merge time — conductor now applies uncommitted flips on main and force-removes.

When frozen contracts grep-pin literals and a new feature needs the same mechanism, extract a shared helper instead of duplicating — landed pins survive byte-exact and the diff doubles as the DRY refactor.
ship-state set --status pending leaves passes:true and next() gates dependents on passes — rollback flows must pin --passes false or dependents build on reverted code.

F-006 polish backlog (dormant): --grep id substring collision only past 999 features (fix with --grep "(<id>):"); pr-mode gh-absent stop is safe-by-construction but unnamed; multi-match guard worth one line near 4-digit ids.
A typecheck gate that exits 0 before the work exists verifies nothing — pick the smallest compiler dial (noImplicitAny) that machine-enforces the coverage bar, prove it red-first with a probe file.

When a skill cannot introspect harness state, design the check as a behavioral probe with a guaranteed audience: the failure detector and the notification channel become the same observation. Anchor prose by step NAME not digit — renumbering breaks digit anchors.

Append-only contract corrections must paraphrase the false text, never quote it — quoting reintroduces the grep-target phrase; pin per-file counts separately so cleanup greps and append-only never conflict.
passed-at-PR-creation splits state truth from workspace truth: dependency gates must check where worktrees are CUT from, and the unblock rule must pin the sync command or the fix only moves the hole.
